description_long: This object is a desktop computer setup consisting of a widescreen monitor, a tower-style CPU, and a set of stereo speakers with a subwoofer. The monitor displays a vibrant anime image and is supported by a circular pedestal stand. The CPU tower is black with a silver front panel, featuring visible drive bays and a power button. The speaker system includes two small satellite speakers and a central subwoofer, all in a matching black finish. The rear of the setup reveals standard computer ports and ventilation grilles, while the monitor's back is plain with a single support arm. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for an office, home, or public computer station.
description: A modern desktop computer setup with a widescreen monitor, black CPU tower, and stereo speakers, featuring a circular pedestal stand and a vibrant display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen monitor with an anime image, the CPU tower to the right, and the stereo speakers to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the CPU tower and the thin profile of the monitor and speakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, the CPU's ports and ventilation, and the back of the speaker system.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the arrangement of the monitor, CPU, and speakers in a linear layout.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a matte finish with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Circular pedestal stand made of plastic with a smooth, flat base and a single support arm connecting to the monitor.
attribute_button_placement: A power button is visible on the front panel of the CPU tower; no buttons are visible on the monitor itself.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel of the CPU tower; several ports and ventilation grilles are present.
